title: KLAMATH ADVOCACY CENTER - 211info
text: KLAMATH ADVOCACY CENTER KLAMATH ADVOCACY CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a helpline, support groups, and a variety of supportive services for survivors of intimate partner violence, sexual assault, stalking, and trafficking. Provides emergency shelter services, based on availability, for survivors. Also provides in-person response to the emergency room for sexual assault survivors and assistance with protective and stalking orders. Every person who contacts Klamath Advocacy Center gets five essential services for safety and independence: safety plan, risk assessment, needs assessment, resource information, and next steps. Eligibility: Shelter: Women and women with minor children who are survivors of domestic/intimate partner violence or sexual assault All other services: Survivors of domestic/intimate partner violence, sexual assault, dating violence, and/or stalking Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (541) 884-0390 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 850-8939 Main phone (541) 884-0390 Helpline Crisis Helpline (541) 884-0390 Access to emergency shelter Main phone (541) 850-8939 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Klamath County Services: Crime Victim Accompaniment Services Domestic Violence Hotlines Domestic Violence Shelters * Mothers Domestic Violence Shelters * Women Domestic Violence Support Groups Protective/Restraining Orders Sexual Assault Hotlines Sexual Assault Shelters * Mothers Sexual Assault Shelters * Women Sexual Assault/Incest Support Groups Other Services Offered At This Location: DOMESTIC ANIMAL SERVICES - SHELTERING ANIMALS AND FAMILIES TOGETHER If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. KLAMATH ADVOCACY CENTER
